name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine + Skill Runtime. Phase A (S3): AgentRegistry + PersistentStore + RuntimeBootstrap. Phase B (S3): SessionManager + SessionStore + TranscriptWriter. Phase C (S3): InboxWatcher + TaskParser + StateHistoryWriter + TaskDispatcher + Runtime composition root. Phase D / Sprint S4: ReviewEngine + ReviewWriter + NeedsHumanGate + AgentStatusReconciler (decision B' integration hook). Phase E / Sprint S5: SkillRegistry + KernelDependencyValidator + MCPInjector — fcop-mcp hard-dependency gate per design doc §0.5 / §0.7.5 / §3.6.
